overall.description: Stationary shot of a wet neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night, featuring game engine footage with reflective asphalt, holographic billboards, and waves of futuristic vehicles passing through the intersection. The scene captures the atmospheric ambiance of a high-tech urban environment with persistent neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the empty wet street and surrounding neon-lit buildings

entered.detail: multi-lane road with reflective wet surface showing neon light reflections
long horizontal fluorescent light fixture spanning across the street
tall vertical digital billboard displaying purple and pink neon advertisements
covered waiting area with glass panels on the left sidewalk
tall modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows lining both sides of the street

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a wet, neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night. The multi-lane road is completely empty with holographic billboards glowing on the right and a bus stop shelter visible on the left. The asphalt reflects the overhead street lights and building illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with holographic advertisements

events.description: first vehicle enters the frame from the right side of the street
red vintage-style car drives past the camera position
white sports car speeds through the intersection toward the camera

agents.ego_description: stationary camera capturing the flow of traffic passing through the intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving toward camera and passing by on the wet asphalt
red vintage car driving past camera with headlights reflecting on wet road

segments.scene_description: Vehicles begin passing through the previously empty street in a steady flow. A black sedan approaches from the distance followed by a distinctive red vintage car and a white sports car. The camera remains stationary as traffic moves through the intersection, with headlights reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: stationary camera during quiet period with no traffic activity

segments.scene_description: The street returns to a quiet state with no vehicles in view for an extended period. The neon lights continue to illuminate the wet asphalt and surrounding glass buildings. The scene remains still with only the ambient glow of the city lights and reflections on the empty road.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with holographic advertisements

events.description: silver sedan and red truck enter from the distance and approach the camera
blue jeep enters from the distance and drives toward the camera position

agents.ego_description: stationary camera capturing second wave of traffic including a blue jeep that comes to a stop

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving toward camera with headlights on
blue jeep driving toward camera and slowing to a stop near the curb

segments.scene_description: A second wave of traffic appears with a silver sedan and red pickup truck driving toward the camera. A blue jeep follows, approaching slowly and coming to a stop near the camera position on the right side. The street remains wet and reflective under the persistent neon lighting of the surrounding buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary view of a rain-slicked cyberpunk intersection that oscillates between eerie stillness and bursts of futuristic traffic. It begins with a completely empty multi-lane road, where holographic billboards and a bus stop shelter cast vibrant neon reflections across the wet asphalt. As the silence breaks, a steady flow of vehicles including a black sedan, a red vintage car, and a white sports car glides through the intersection, their headlights shimmering on the pavement. The scene then returns to a quiet state, leaving only the ambient glow of glass buildings and persistent neon lights to illuminate the vacant street. Finally, a second wave of traffic emerges as a silver sedan and red pickup truck drive forward, followed by a blue jeep that slows to a stop near the camera position.
